Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiffs Individual Paga Claim And To Stay Action Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT MASTRO'S RESTAURANTS, LLC, LANDRY'S INC., LANDRY'S PAYROLL, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiffs Individual Paga Claim And To Stay Action.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's motion to compel arbitration of plaintiffs' individual claims is granted and the court stays litigation of the remaining representative claims.

Order signed (see signed order/word minutes for complete ruling).

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)
